Title: Relates to setting comprehensive outpatient services
Summary: Authorizes the commissioner of the office of mental health, and the office of addiction services and support to jointly establish a single set of licensing standards and requirements for the construction, operation, reporting and surveillance of comprehensive outpatient services centers.
LawCode: Add §36.08, amd §§31.02 & 32.05, Ment Hyg L; amd §488, Soc Serv L; amd §2801, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, the public health law and the mental hygiene law, in relation to setting comprehensive outpatient services
